rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Windows Scheduled Task Creating Shell

rules.rule_text:
title: Windows Scheduled Task Creating Shell
id: 8b1a34e3-c4d6-4af6-9836-35a0da09b85b
status: experimental
description: "Adversaries frequently establish persistence by using scheduled tasks\
  \ to launch \nthe Windows Command Shell. Detecting this behavior is relatively straightforward.\
  \ \nPart of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.003
- attack.t1053
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection1:
    Image|endswith: \schtasks.exe
    CommandLine|contains: create
  selection2:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - cmd.exe /c
    - cmd /c
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
